# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM docker:latest

# Install any additional dependencies if required
RUN apk add --no-cache curl

# Set the working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy your orchestration service application code into the container
COPY . .

# Expose any necessary ports
EXPOSE 8080

# Define entrypoint for the orchestration service
ENTRYPOINT ["./your_orchestration_service_executable"]

# Optionally specify a default command
CMD ["--help"] 

# Set the container to run with privileged permissions
USER root

# When running the container, mount the Docker socket from the host
# docker run -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock --privileged your_image_name
